headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://icp0.io https://*.icp0.io https://ic0.app https://*.ic0.app https://identity.ic0.app; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'
